title: viola arvensis var. anglica
intro: Viola arvensis var. anglica, also known as the English field violet, is a plant species that belongs to the viola genus and is native to Europe and North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Viola arvensis var. anglica include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote relaxation. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
